items.titolo: I tested ChatGPT's Live Voice upgrade, and it almost felt human - how to try it
items.descrizione: The latest GPT Live Voice models can listen, speak, and conduct online research all at the same time. Does it feel like you're talking with a real person? Almost.

items.titolo: Google Home cambia marcia: nuove automazioni e correzioni
items.descrizione: Google Home riceve suggerimenti AI per le automazioni e migliora Gemini.

items.titolo: Anthropic Wants You to Pay Up for Claude Fable 5
items.descrizione: Claude subscribers must soon pay usage-based fees to access Anthropic’s best consumer AI model—a sign that the golden era of AI subscriptions is ending.
